title: Monorepo + pnpm + TS/ESM + CI (build/test/lint + content-schema validation) skeleton
context: Civics-Exam-Prep is an Elyos donated-lane project delivering free, offline, accessible practice items. The repository skeleton (pnpm workspaces, TypeScript/ESM, CI for build/test/lint + content-schema validation) is the foundation all content and app work builds on.
objective: Stand up the monorepo skeleton with pnpm workspaces, TypeScript/ESM, and a green CI pipeline running build/test/lint plus content-schema validation.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspaces + TypeScript/ESM skeleton builds clean (pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass)
CI runs build, test, lint, and the content-schema validation step on every PR and is green
Repo layout supports later packages (schema, validator, app, exporters) without churn
